example_queries.title: Find high-value transactions
example_queries.description: Search for transactions over $500 for VIP customer analysis

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.totalAmount > 500 ORDER BY c.totalAmount DESC

example_queries.expected_use_case: VIP customer identification and retention programs

example_queries.title: Search electronics purchases
example_queries.description: Find all transactions containing electronics products
example_queries.expected_use_case: Category performance analysis and inventory planning

example_queries.title: Query recent online orders
example_queries.description: List all online channel orders from the last 7 days

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.salesChannel = 'Online' AND c.transactionDate >= '2025-12-29'

example_queries.expected_use_case: E-commerce performance tracking and fulfillment planning

example_queries.title: Find customer purchase history
example_queries.description: Retrieve all transactions for a specific customer

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.customerId = 'CUST-12345' ORDER BY c.transactionDate DESC

example_queries.title: Semantic search for gift purchases
example_queries.description: Find gift-related transactions using AI semantic understanding

parameters.search_text: gift birthday present holiday christmas valentine

example_queries.expected_use_case: Seasonal marketing and gift recommendation systems

example_queries.title: Query by store location
example_queries.description: Analyze transactions from New York stores
example_queries.expected_use_case: Regional performance analysis and local inventory optimization

example_queries.title: Find failed transactions
example_queries.description: Identify failed or cancelled orders for recovery campaigns

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.status IN ('Failed', 'Cancelled')

example_queries.expected_use_case: Cart abandonment recovery and payment issue resolution

example_queries.title: AI product recommendation
example_queries.description: Generate personalized product recommendations using customer history

messages.content: You are a retail product recommendation assistant.
Based on a customer who recently purchased running shoes and fitness tracker, suggest 3 complementary products.

example_queries.title: Query loyalty program members
example_queries.description: Find customers with high loyalty points balance

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.loyaltyPoints > 1000 ORDER BY c.loyaltyPoints DESC

example_queries.expected_use_case: Loyalty program engagement and reward campaigns

example_queries.title: Search promotional campaign usage
example_queries.description: Analyze transactions using specific promotion codes
